title: Cirrus: Minor, fix env. var. intention
body: Using env. var. on the RHS of an `only_if` was broken in Cirrus-CI (the service).  It's fixed now, so this PR is now only a very small/minor fix.

comments.body: *note*: I've identified a breakdown with Cirrus-CI conditional processing here.  Waiting on response from their support before I continue.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #4073) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
this one is ready (but no rush, it's minor)
